channel.title: EDM on Cheng Music
channel.description: Recent content in EDM on Cheng Music

item.title: Fight In Space
item.description: About the game These tracks are for an FPS indie game. The game happens on a spaceship, where the player is surrounded by high-tech items and some lethal crazy machines which are trying to kill the player. The player is encouraged to kill these machine enemies and to survive as long as possible. Here is the description from the designer himself: The story is, the world has been taken over by robots as Mr.

item.title: Roll With It
item.description: About the game The theme of this Jam is Roll Of The Dice. Our team made a game that consisted of 6 mini-games. Each time the dice is rolled, the player is switched to a different game. Well, there are: Serve: Serve the right food to the right customer, but do it quickly or they will get angry! Avoid: The objective is simple - avoid the bullets! Jump: Jump over the obstacles, and try not to die Count: Match the number on the screen with the amount of dots on the dice before the time runs out!
